ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MISTI FITZJARRALD, MOLLY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MISTI FITZJARRALD, MOLLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3268 20TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,089.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,089.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICT UNTIL 12:01AM 9-1-96. $2089 BACK RENT & DMGS WAS PAID TO PLTF BY DEFTS ON 7-11-96 IN FULL SATISF OF THIS PORTION OF JUDGMNT. PLTF WAIVES $1025 RENT & DMGS FOR MONTH OF AUG '96. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. SEE JUDGMNT FOR FURTHER CONDITNS.
